subcodes.first_line: O ye wanderers in the path of God! From your cherished homeland ye have been banished and made remote through the tyranny of every cruel oppressor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آوارگان سبیل الهی از وطن مالوف بسبب طغیان هر ستمکار عسوف دور و مهجور شدید
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @predictions and prophecies, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause
